title: Beer Weeks
body:
# EN

- Kvas Karsenysh
- Nastoyka Barmovukha
- Medovukha Pchelka
- Rum Kok Saker

- Shampusik Paravoz
- JackDaniels Whiskey
- Scottish ale
- Samogon Dedovsky
- Dark beer Deep bob
- Cognac Gelendzhik
- Aperol Porosolochka
- Mojito Tiktonik
- Vodka Power of ancestors
- Gin Great Call

# RUS

- Шампусик Паравоз

- Эль Шотландский
